title: lippia sclerophylla
intro: Lippia sclerophylla is a species of plant in the family Verbenaceae, commonly known as the rough-leaved or hard-leaved lippia. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a valuable natural remedy. The health benefits of Lippia sclerophylla include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, among other uses. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
